# JS Atlas Development Phases

This folder tracks the implementation progress of JS Atlas.

Each phase document contains:

* Goals
* Completed tasks
* Generated files
* Deployment notes
* Known issues
* Next steps

Planned phases:

* phase-01.md — Foundation and deployment
* phase-02.md — Design system and application shell
* phase-03.md — Content engine
* phase-04.md — Search and documentation features
* phase-05.md — Authentication and progress tracking
* phase-06.md — Interactive learning
* phase-07.md — Community features
* phase-08.md — SEO and performance
* phase-09.md — Curriculum generation
